chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-482 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of main case 07.10.2025 Ms. Rehana Siddiqui, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh Mr. Ghulam Abbas Sangi, Assistant Attorney General ----- Learned Counsel for the Petitioner states that the Revision, which was pending before the Adjudicating Authority-I, Employees’ Old-age Benefits Institution, Sindh & Baluchistan at Karachi, has now been decided. It appears that the purpose for which this Petition was filed seems to have been served. If the Petitioner is aggrieved by the Order of the Revision, she may challenge it in accordance with law, if so desired. The Petition stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
